Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Serving Krsna

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-10-15 · 3 answers
How can I serve Krsna because he is not present before me?
user [152] · 2007-10-15
I am serving you by responding to you, even though you are not present before me.
user [198] · 2007-10-15
Should I worship the deity to serve Krsna?
user [38] · 2007-10-16
Start with chanting and associating with devotees - ask them for a hands-on service you can do. "Serving a devotee is better than serving Krishna...." (SB 11.19.21)

‹ all questions
